## Meeting Purpose

[First all-hands meeting for the Engineering, Product, and Design (EPD) team to align on company direction, share updates, and demo recent work.](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's year one goal: Validate the "services as software" concept by March 2024, focusing on enabling one person to perform as a team](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Team structure: Staying flat with \~15 people, no traditional product managers or engineering managers for now](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Key focus areas: Strategy, Production, and AI Engineering functions to scale the agency and serve target clients](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Recent demos showcase advancements in Webflow publishing, programmatic SEO, AI-assisted editing, and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure and Focus

  - [First fully assembled EPD team with all critical lanes staffed (though spread thin)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Aiming for \~15 people total, adding a couple more in ML/AI](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Staying flat organizationally for at least the first year](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [No traditional product managers; engineers have autonomy on feature decisions](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Daniel holding weekly 1:1s with all 12 product team members for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Year One Goals and Strategy

  - [Validate "services as software" concept by March 2024 (1 year from fundraising)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Enable one well-equipped person to perform as a team](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Focus on serving specific client types (Ideal Customer Profile - ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Three key functions: Strategy, Production, and AI Engineering](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Building tools for content marketers/creators to match programmer productivity gains](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Client Ops Engineering Team

  - [Acts as first line of defense for understanding agency needs](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Rotates responsibility for triaging tickets, answering Slack support, and being strategy sprint consultant](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Conducts R\&D (e.g., testing agent-based refreshing)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Other team members encouraged to spend time with Client Ops for context](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Webflow Publishing Workflow (Ben)

  - [New declarative approach to handle Webflow's complex collection structures and enums](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Generator tool creates config files and types, reducing manual work](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
  - [Potential for public release to gain community goodwill (Webflow CPO is an angel investor)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)

### Programmatic SEO Framework (Kirkland)

  - [Utilizes existing researcher workflows with templated questions](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
  - [Article draft workflow uses markdown templates stored as Atlas artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2723.0)
  - [Enables quick setup of programmatic SEO campaigns (5 minutes for non-complex cases)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2803.0)
  - [Multiple pipelines already using this approach](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)

### AI-Assisted Editing (Brad)

  - [TipTap-based WYSIWYG editor with custom AI integrations](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)
  - [Features include text selection AI actions, full document edits, and artifact context inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3030.0)
  - [Upcoming AI assistant feature in development](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3186.0)
  - [Need to improve prompting and consider UI placement (popover vs. sidebar)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3299.0)

### Image Generation Workflows (Daniel/GP)

  - [Two main workflows: HTML template to image conversion and GPT-based image creation](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)
  - [GPT Images workflow generates ideas and creates images based on article content and art direction](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3666.0)
  - [HTML templating engine creates flexible, variable-based templates for marketing materials](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3787.0)
  - [New artifact type in Atlas for HTML templates with preview functionality](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3989.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule demo of updated TipTap AI editing features for the delivery team](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
  - [Improve prompting for AI-assisted editing (Brad and Kirkland to discuss)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3422.0)
  - [Consider knowledge base integration for programmatic SEO and editing contexts](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3345.0)
  - [Review and merge GP's HTML templating work (resolving conflicts)](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=4141.0)
  - [Continue developing and refining image generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)
  - [Prepare for more in-depth discussions on AI editing features in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/gNmLExhHfxacX6GNHwC4JSQZfn8ao_Ju?tab=summary&timestamp=3345.0)
